project_type: Vanilla JS single-page application with Firebase/Firestore backend
build_command: N/A - static files, no build step
verification_instructions: Open index.html in browser, test portal and dinas luar features manually. For automated validation: use Node.js to parse JS files for syntax errors.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML/JS/CSS files served directly
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs. Validation limited to AST/syntax checks with Node.js.
contribution_requirements: No formal contributing guide. Code follows vanilla JS patterns with Firestore integration.
key_patterns: Global functions called via onclick handlers in HTML templates. Firestore collections prefixed with hrd_. Grade system uses BENEFIT_CONFIG_BY_GRADE and resolveGradeKey(). Portal pages prefixed with renderPortal*. Navigation uses navigateTo(page) with routes map in core.js. Modals via openModal(html). Toast notifications via toast(msg,type).
relevant_files: absensi-ijef.js (lines 854-920: renderDinasLuar, loadDinasTab, modalDinasLuar, simpanDinasLuar, viewDinasLuar)
modules.js (lines 4594-4700: modalAjukanSPPD, simpanSPPD with hrd_dinas_luar integration)
modules.js (lines 3088-3130: renderPortal - portal homepage with stat-cards and quick-action buttons)
core.js (lines 100-223: renderApp, buildNavItems, navGroup, navigateTo with routes map)
core.js (lines 179-183: navGroup - nav-group-items with display:none for collapsed groups)
index.html (full file: CSS styles, DOM structure)
directory_structure: Single directory app: index.html (entry + CSS), core.js (routing/auth/helpers), modules.js (all HR modules), absensi-ijef.js (attendance/dinas luar), disc-test.html/js (separate DISC page), sw.js (service worker), manifest.json (PWA)
